description: Deterministic semantic contract suite for declared-before-use validator behavior in sv_stimuli_quality_gate.

cases.name: declared_assignment_pass
cases.input: module m; logic a; assign a = 1'b0; endmodule

cases.name: undeclared_rhs_fail
cases.input: module m; logic a; assign a = b; endmodule

cases.name: undeclared_lhs_fail
cases.input: module m; logic a; assign b = a; endmodule

cases.name: for_loop_typed_iterator_pass
cases.input: module m; logic [3:0] a; always_comb begin for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++) a[i] = 1'b0; end endmodule

cases.name: foreach_iterator_pass
cases.input: module m; logic [3:0] arr; always_comb begin foreach (arr[idx]) arr[idx] = 1'b1; end endmodule

cases.name: event_control_declared_clock_pass
cases.input: module m; logic clk; logic q; always @(posedge clk) q <= 1'b0; endmodule

cases.name: named_port_actual_declared_pass
cases.input: module child(input logic a); endmodule module top; logic sig; child u0(.a(sig)); endmodule

cases.name: named_port_actual_undeclared_fail
cases.input: module child(input logic a); endmodule module top; child u0(.a(sig)); endmodule

cases.name: package_qualified_use_pass
cases.input: module m; logic [7:0] a; assign a = pkg::CONST; endmodule

cases.name: timeunit_statement_pass
cases.input: timeunit 1ns/1ps; module m; logic a; assign a = 1'b0; endmodule

cases.name: macro_token_noise_pass
cases.input: module m; logic a; `FOO(bar) assign a = 1'b0; endmodule

cases.name: if_condition_undeclared_fail
cases.input: module m; logic a; always_comb begin if (b) a = 1'b1; end endmodule
